title: Talisman (符) OCR/encode batch — output contract for Grok
description: What `grok --json-schema` must produce when OCR+encoding a batch of 符 (talisman) scan images. Reused for mantra/ritual/cultivation/classic via `layer`. Every entry MUST carry ≥2 independent `sources` and a `textual_certainty`. 符 is described structurally + visually only — NEVER operational draw/print instructions (practitioner caveat).

id.description: Stable UPPER_SNAKE id, e.g. FU_JIN_GUANG. Prefix by layer: FU_/ZHOU_/FA_/DAN_/JING_.

name_han.description: Original Hán name (繁體/簡體 as in source).

name_vi.description: Sino-Vietnamese reading (e.g. Phù Kim Quang). Optional but preferred.

school.description: 傳承: 茅山|正一|閭山|全真|北帝|洞淵|清微|神霄|通用… + region if relevant.

layer.description: fu=符籙, mantra=神咒/口訣, ritual=科儀步驟, cultivation=功法/內丹外丹, classic=經典原文.

ocr_text.description: Verbatim Hán text OCR'd from the scan (咒/口訣原文, or any text written on the 符). Empty string if the image has no legible text. Preserve 繁/簡 as in source; note variants in textual_certainty/notes.

structure.description: 符 structural decomposition (符 only; omit/null for other layers). Descriptive, NOT a drawing guide.

head.description: 符頭 — 點三清/敕令 etc.

body.description: 符身 — 主神名諱 + 功能字.

belly.description: 符腹 — 八卦/星象/罡步符號.

core.description: 符膽 — 三才五行之氣樞紐.

foot.description: 符腳 — 押煞/急急如律令.

visual_description.description: Faithful visual description of the 符 strokes/symbols as seen (for SVG/reference). No fabrication.

meaning.description: What it traditionally does / symbolises (hedged: 'theo truyền thống…').

use.description: Traditional use category: 護身|驅邪|淨化|治病|招財|和合|鎮宅… (reference only).

recitation_context.description: When/how traditionally recited or deployed; include 受箓 caveat if relevant.

sources.description: ≥2 INDEPENDENT reachable sources (prefer primary canon: ctext DZ#### / wikisource / 道藏; then academic/gov). Each item = full URL + parenthetical label.

verification_status.description: verified_2plus_independent = ≥2 independent sources confirmed reachable & text matched.

textual_certainty.description: high=verbatim matches primary canon; partial=variants/uncertainty flagged; low=representative excerpt only.

scan_path.description: Local scan file this entry was OCR'd from (relative to app root).

notes.description: Batch-level notes: legibility issues, variant conflicts, anything the verifier should re-check.
